Private by design

Many tools run locally in your browser. Your files stay on your device.

Free Online Tools for Images, Text and More

PixMidas is a growing collection of free online tools for everyday digital tasks. Compress images, resize photos, convert files, generate QR codes, compare text, count words, merge PDFs and more without complicated software or account creation.

PixMidas focuses on lightweight, fast and privacy-friendly browser tools. Many tools process files locally on your device instead of uploading them to external servers.

Popular Free Tools

  • Free Image Compressor
  • Online Image Resizer
  • Free Image Cropper
  • PNG to JPG Converter
  • WebP to JPG Converter
  • PDF to JPG Converter
  • Merge PDF Files
  • Free QR Code Generator
  • Password Generator
  • Case Converter
  • Color Picker HEX RGB
  • Word Counter Tool
  • Text Difference Checker
  • Images to PDF Converter
  • Social Media Sizes Guide

⚡ PixMidas

Free browser-based tools. No login required. Runs locally in your browser.
